title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open to shipping but Trump says U.S. blockade still active
summary_full: The Strait of Hormuz has remained almost completely closed as the U.S. and Iran have disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.
summary_public: The Strait of Hormuz has remained almost completely closed as the U.S. and Iran have disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.
